description: Composition Red and black checked full-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has one pocket on the left chest, full arms and buttoned cuffs, a mid-sleeve button with a full length buttoned placket on the front, and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what lee brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The full sleeves are sure to keep the chill away this winter, while you can roll up the sleeves to suit the occasion. Pair it with denims or corduroys and funky footwear for casual looks. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
